title: Boxed in 2
overview: After overcoming seemingly insurmountable odds to be the best in the game, Ria finds herself a rising star in the world of boxing. She has everything she could ever imagine with the exception of one thing: Love. She meets El by chance and starts to let go of her past disappointments and grab ahold of hope for the future. But with anything, nothing is ever as it seems. Faced with new revelations along with the pressure of being the boxer that everyone wants a shot at, Ria will have to decide if it's worth fighting for the sport she believes in and most importantly, the one she believes in.
